summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected. No GitHub mutations, merge, fix, or PR actions are proposed because this job disables merge/fix/raise_pr and low-signal/instant close paths. Security-sensitive linked DingTalk bundle PRs are quarantined item-by-item; unrelated non-security PRs remain classified for maintainer follow-up or ordinary keep-open handling.
